lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਸਚਿ ਨਾਮਿ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: sadaa kaaraj sach naam suhelaa bin sabadai kaaraj kehaa he |7|
lines.english: Through the True Name, one's actions are forever embellished. Without the Shabad, what can anyone do? ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਹਸੈ ਖਿਨ ਮਹਿ ਰੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: khin meh hasai khin meh rovai |
lines.english: One instant, he laughs, and the next instant, he cries.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੂਜੀ ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਕਾਰਜੁ ਨ ਹੋਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: doojee duramat kaaraj na hovai |
lines.english: Because of duality and evil-mindedness, his affairs are not resolved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਜੋਗੁ ਵਿਜੋਗੁ ਕਰਤੈ ਲਿਖਿ ਪਾਏ ਕਿਰਤੁ ਨ ਚਲੈ ਚਲਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: sanjog vijog karatai likh paae kirat na chalai chalaahaa he |8|
lines.english: Union and separation are pre-ordained by the Creator. Actions already committed cannot be taken back. ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਰਹੈ ਸਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: har siau sad hee rahai samaae |
lines.english: He remains forever immersed in the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਨ ਮੁਕਤਿ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jeevan mukat gurasabad kamaae |
lines.english: One who lives the Word of the Guru's Shabad becomes Jivan Mukta - liberated while yet alive.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ਨ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: gur kirapaa te milai vaddiaaee haumai rog na taahaa he |9|
lines.english: By Guru's Grace, one is blessed with glorious greatness; he is not afflicted by the disease of egotism. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤਰਿ ਰੋਗੁ ਮਹਾ ਦੁਖੁ ਭਾਰੀ ਬਿਸਟਾ ਮਾਹਿ ਸਮਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: antar rog mahaa dukh bhaaree bisattaa maeh samaahaa he |10|
lines.english: Deep with the nucleus of his being is the great disease; he suffers terrible pain, and eventually sinks into the manure. ||10||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੇਖ ਕਰੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੁ ਨ ਕਮਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: bhekh karai gurasabad na kamaae |
lines.english: and wears religious robes, but he does not live to the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਸ ਕਸ ਖਾਏ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਵਧਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: ras kas khaae pindd vadhaae |
lines.english: Eating tasty delicacies, he fattens up his body

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟ ਮਹਿ ਬ੍ਰਹਮੁ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਬਦਿ ਨ ਪਛਾਣਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt meh braham tis sabad na pachhaaneh |
lines.english: God is within his own heart, but he does not recognize the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬੇਦ ਪੜਹਿ ਪੜਿ ਬਾਦੁ ਵਖਾਣਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: bed parreh parr baad vakhaaneh |
lines.english: He reads and studies the Vedas, and argues about them;

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹੋਵੈ ਸੁ ਤਤੁ ਬਿਲੋਵੈ ਰਸਨਾ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh hovai su tat bilovai rasanaa har ras taahaa he |11|
lines.english: One who becomes Gurmukh churns the essence of reality; his tongue savors the sublime essence of the Lord. ||11||

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਰਿ ਵਥੁ ਛੋਡਹਿ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਧਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: ghar vath chhoddeh baahar dhaaveh |
lines.english: Those who forsake the object within their own hearts, wander outside.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨ ਰਸ ਰਾਤੀ ਰਸਨਾ ਫੀਕੀ ਬੋਲੇ ਹਰਿ ਰਸੁ ਮੂਲਿ ਨ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੨॥
lines.translit: an ras raatee rasanaa feekee bole har ras mool na taahaa he |12|
lines.english: Imbued with the taste of another, their tongues speak tasteless, insipid words. They never taste the sublime essence of the Lord. ||12||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਅੰਧੇ ਸਾਦੁ ਨ ਪਾਵਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh andhe saad na paaveh |
lines.english: The blind, self-willed manmukhs do not taste the flavor of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਿ ਕ੍ਰੋਧਿ ਮਨੁ ਦੂਜੈ ਲਾਇਆ ਸੁਪਨੈ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਤਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੩॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh man doojai laaeaa supanai sukh na taahaa he |13|
lines.english: His mind is attached to sexual desire, anger and duality, and he does not find peace, even in dreams. ||13||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨਮੁਖ ਦੇਹੀ ਭਰਮੁ ਭਤਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: manamukh dehee bharam bhataaro |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukh has doubt as his spouse.

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਮਤਿ ਮਰੈ ਨਿਤ ਹੋਇ ਖੁਆਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: duramat marai nit hoe khuaaro |
lines.english: He dies of evil-mindedness, and suffers forever.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਚਨ ਦੇਹੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਭਤਾਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: kanchan dehee sabad bhataaro |
lines.english: The body becomes golden, with the Word of the Shabad as its spouse.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦਿਨੁ ਭੋਗ ਭੋਗੇ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਉ ਪਿਆਰੋ ॥
lines.translit: anadin bhog bhoge har siau piaaro |
lines.english: Night and day, enjoy the enjoyments, and be in love with the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਨਹੀ ਕਿਸੈ ਕਾ ਚਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: tis aagai nahee kisai kaa chaaraa |
lines.english: No one has any power to stand against Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ਅੰਦਰਿ ਗੈਰ ਮਹਲੁ ਪਾਏ ਭਾਣਾ ਬੁਝਿ ਸਮਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: mahalaa andar gair mehal paae bhaanaa bujh samaahaa he |14|
lines.english: Deep within the mansion of the self, one finds the Lord, who transcends this mansion. Realizing His Will, we merge in Him. ||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦੇਵੈ ਦੇਵਣਹਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape devai devanahaaraa |
lines.english: The Great Giver Himself gives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਪਿੰਡੁ ਸਭੁ ਹੈ ਤਿਸੁ ਕੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: jeeo pindd sabh hai tis keraa |
lines.english: Body and soul, all belong to Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਬਖਸੇ ਸਬਦਿ ਮਿਲਾਏ ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਸਬਦੁ ਅਥਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੫॥
lines.translit: aape bakhase sabad milaae tis daa sabad athaahaa he |15|
lines.english: He Himself forgives, and unites us with the Shabad; The Word of His Shabad is unfathomable. ||15||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਗੁਰਬਾਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਪਾਇਆ ਹਰਿ ਜਪੁ ਜਾਪਿ ਸਮਾਹਾ ਹੇ ॥੧੬॥੫॥੧੪॥
lines.translit: naanak gurabaanee har paaeaa har jap jaap samaahaa he |16|5|14|
lines.english: O Nanak, through the Word of the Guru's Bani, I have found the Lord. Chanting the Lord's Chant, I merge in Him. ||16||5||14||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਠਾਕੁਰੁ ਮੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: sachaa saahib tthaakur meraa |
lines.english: The True Lord is my only Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਮਹਲਾ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Maaroo, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਗਿਆਨੁ ਧਿਆਨੁ ਆਪਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh giaan dhiaan aapaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh attains infinite spiritual wisdom and meditation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਾਦ ਬੇਦ ਬੀਚਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh naad bed beechaar |
lines.english: The Gurmukh contemplates the sound current of the Naad instead of the Vedas.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕਾਰ ਕਰੇ ਪ੍ਰਭ ਭਾਵੈ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਪੂਰਾ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: guramukh kaar kare prabh bhaavai guramukh pooraa paaeidaa |1|
lines.english: The Gurmukh acts in harmony with God's Will; the Gurmukh finds perfection. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਨੂਆ ਉਲਟਿ ਪਰਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh manooaa ulatt paraavai |
lines.english: The mind of the Gurmukh turns away from the world.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਬਾਣੀ ਨਾਦੁ ਵਜਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh baanee naad vajaavai |
lines.english: The Gurmukh vibrates the Naad, the sound current of the Guru's Bani.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚਿ ਰਤੇ ਬੈਰਾਗੀ ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਵਾਸਾ ਪਾਇਦਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: guramukh sach rate bairaagee nij ghar vaasaa paaeidaa |2|
lines.english: The Gurmukh, attuned to the Truth, remains detached, and dwells in the home of the self deep within. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੈ ਸਬਦੇ ਸਚੁ ਸੁਭਾਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: sachai sabade sach subhaakhee |
lines.english: I lovingly chant the Truth, through the True Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸਾਖੀ ਅੰਮ੍ਰਿਤ ਭਾਖੀ ॥
lines.translit: gur kee saakhee amrit bhaakhee |
lines.english: I speak the Ambrosial Teachings of the Guru.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਸਤ ਸਰਿ ਨਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh man niramal sat sar naavai |
lines.english: Immaculate and pure is the mind of the Gurmukh, who bathes in the Pool of Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦਾ ਸਚਿ ਰੰਗਿ ਰਾਤਾ ਮਨੁ ਮੇਰਾ ਸਚੇ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਇਦਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sadaa sach rang raataa man meraa sache sach samaaeidaa |3|
lines.english: My mind remains forever imbued with the Love of the True Lord. I am immersed in the Truest of the True. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸਚੀ ਭਗਤਿ ਦ੍ਰਿੜਾਇਦਾ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sacho sach kamaavai sad hee sachee bhagat drirraaeidaa |4|
lines.english: He truly practices Truth forever; true devotion is implanted within him. ||4||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੈਲੁ ਨ ਲਾਗੈ ਸਚਿ ਸਮਾਵੈ ॥
lines.translit: mail na laagai sach samaavai |
lines.english: No filth attaches to him; he merges in the True Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਬੈਣੀ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਨੈਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sach bainee guramukh sach nainee |
lines.english: True is the speech of the Gurmukh; true are the eyes of the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਦ ਹੀ ਸਚੁ ਕਹੈ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਅਵਰਾ ਸਚੁ ਕਹਾਇਦਾ ॥੫॥
lines.translit: sad hee sach kahai din raatee avaraa sach kahaaeidaa |5|
lines.english: He speaks the Truth forever, day and night, and inspires others to speak the Truth. ||5||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੁ ਕਮਾਵੈ ਕਰਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sach kamaavai karanee |
lines.english: The Gurmukh practices and lives the Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੋ ਸਚੁ ਵਖਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sacho sach vakhaanee |
lines.english: The Gurmukh speaks Truth, only Truth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਚੀ ਊਤਮ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sachee aootam baanee |
lines.english: True and exalted is the speech of the Gurmukh.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦ ਸੇਵਹਿ ਸਚੋ ਸਚਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਬਦੁ ਸੁਣਾਇਦਾ ॥੬॥
lines.translit: guramukh sad seveh sacho sachaa guramukh sabad sunaaeidaa |6|
lines.english: The Gurmukh serves the Truest of the True forever; the Gurmukh proclaims the Word of the Shabad. ||6||
